body:
## Current strict residual census

Generated on 2026-06-11 from:

```bash
python3 ./scripts/sorry_census.py --fail-on-holes
python3 ./scripts/forbidden_tokens.py
python3 ./scripts/residual_census.py
```

The hole census and forbidden-token scan are clean: no live `sorry`/`admit`, no undocumented custom `axiom`, no bodyless `constant`/`opaque`, no `native_decide`/`bv_decide`, and no vacuous `theorem/lemma ... : True` placebo. The strict residual census still reports **22 open residual `Prop` obligations**. These are the remaining tracked unproven surfaces that need to be proved, narrowed, renamed out of the residual ledger if they are deliberately false/obsolete, or retired by API redesign.

## Open residuals

### GKL24 / witness cover

- `ProximityGap.GKL24MaxCorrStrictWitnessCoverResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/Connections/GKL24FirstMoment.lean:1309`
- `ProximityGap.GKL24MaxCorrWitnessCoverResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/Connections/GKL24FirstMoment.lean:1330`; conditional on strict witness cover
- `ProximityGap.GKL24PetalWitnessCoverResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/Connections/GKL24FirstMoment.lean:1412`; conditional on strict/max/domain witness covers
- `ProximityGap.Issue67Scratch.GKL24MaxDomainWitnessCoverResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/Connections/GKL24PetalWitnessCover.lean:56`

### BCIKS20 / Hensel / curve list size

- `ProximityGap.StrictCanonicalCoeffPolysResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/BCIKS20/Curves.lean:2528`
- `ProximityGap.RSCurveListSizeResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/BCIKS20/Curves/ListSizeResidual.lean:45`
- `BCIKS20.HenselNumerator.βHenselSuccTermWeightResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/BCIKS20/HenselNumerator.lean:1598`; conditional on structured-weight route
- `BCIKS20.HenselNumerator.RestrictedFaaDiBrunoMatchResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/BCIKS20/P2MatchProof.lean:30`
- `ProximityGap.StrictCoeffPolysExcResidual` — `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/BCIKS20/StrictCoeffPolysExceptional.lean:157`; conditional on strict coefficient residuals

### Sequential composition / Fiat-Shamir security

- `Verifier.appendKnowledgeSoundnessResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/Composition/Sequential/Append.lean:996`; documented as the obstructed straightline route
- `OracleVerifier.appendKnowledgeSoundnessResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/Composition/Sequential/Append.lean:1184`; oracle-level twin of the obstructed straightline route
- `DuplexSpongeFS.BirthdayBound.Lemma5_8EagerBirthdayResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/FiatShamir/DuplexSponge/Security/BirthdayBound.lean:470`
- `DuplexSpongeFS.KeyLemmaResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/FiatShamir/DuplexSponge/Security/KeyLemma.lean:245`
- `DuplexSpongeFS.KeyLemmaFoundations.Lemma5_14HonestResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/FiatShamir/DuplexSponge/Security/KeyLemmaFoundations.lean:647`
- `DuplexSpongeFS.KeyLemmaFoundations.KeyLemmaEagerResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/FiatShamir/DuplexSponge/Security/KeyLemmaFoundations.lean:966`; conditional on hybrid/budget residuals
- `DuplexSpongeFS.KeyLemmaHybrids.Hyb01StepResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/FiatShamir/DuplexSponge/Security/KeyLemmaHybrids.lean:709`
- `DuplexSpongeFS.KeyLemmaHybrids.Hyb12StepResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/FiatShamir/DuplexSponge/Security/KeyLemmaHybrids.lean:731`
- `DuplexSpongeFS.KeyLemmaHybrids.Hyb23StepResidual` — `ArkLib/OracleReduction/FiatShamir/DuplexSponge/Security/KeyLemmaHybrids.lean:754`

### FRI query completeness

- `Fri.Spec.Completeness.queryRoundPerfectCompletenessResidual` — `ArkLib/ProofSystem/Fri/Spec/Completeness.lean:49`; documented as suspected false as stated, with repaired theorem in `ToMathlib/FriCompleteQueryRound.lean`
- `Fri.Spec.Completeness.queryRoundChainDeliveryResidual` — `ArkLib/ToMathlib/FriCompleteQueryRound.lean:177`; remaining delivery proof that honest fold-phase output satisfies checker acceptance

### WHIR / MCA Johnson K4

- `MutualCorrAgreement.K4GradedFactorCellResidual` — `ArkLib/ProofSystem/Whir/MCAJohnsonBound.lean:46`; conditional on component residual
- `MutualCorrAgreement.K4ComponentResidual` — `ArkLib/ProofSystem/Whir/MCAJohnsonBound.lean:64`

## Acceptance criteria

- Each item is either proved with an axiom-clean theorem, deleted/renamed if it is an obsolete or intentionally false statement surface, or narrowed into a faithful hypothesis with a direct issue link and docstring.
- The strict residual census decreases from 22 toward 0; no item is hidden by renaming without preserving an honest tracker.
- The clean shortcut checks remain clean: no new `sorry`/`admit`, custom `axiom`, `native_decide`, `bv_decide`, bodyless `constant`/`opaque`, `True :=`, or vacuous `theorem ... : True`.
- For each proof landed, include a focused `lake env lean` or `lake build` target result and a `#print axioms` check showing no `sorryAx`.

Related: #351 (broad residual-named surface audit), #357 (grand MCA threshold tracker), #313/#317 (Binius residual closeout).
title: Strict residual burn-down: 22 open Prop obligations
